source_jobs.title: Customer Success Manager
Join Our Community of Prospective Expletives
source_jobs.description:
<p>Don’t see the role you were looking for? That’s OK. We’re adding new roles all the time. In the meantime, we want to keep in touch with you, share more about our fun culture, and all the neat things we are doing at Expel. There is no better way to stay in-the-know and for us to get to know each other than by joining our Community of Prospective Expletives!&nbsp;</p>
<p>&nbsp;</p>

source_jobs.title: Manager, Technical Support Engineering
Product Manager, Platform & Monetization
Senior AI Platform Engineer
Senior Customer Success Manager
Senior Technical Marketing Writer
Senior UX Designer

notes: Expel is a cybersecurity company with a mix of technical and non-technical roles. The company has a strong focus on customer success and technical support.
